spoken: Four hundred and seventy-six elements on a live eBay search page. Every button, every link, every filter. The sieve found them all. No LLM. No vision model. Zero tokens.
Nav dot sign-in-link is clickable. Nav dot deals-link is clickable. Search dot category-dropdown is typable. Structured. Deterministic. Named.
Now a state park reservation system. Completely different site. Live.
A hundred and seventeen elements. Date cells in the availability calendar. Navigation controls. Map interactions. All detected.
Banner dot park-title is readable. Nav dot login-button is clickable. Banner dot directions-button is clickable. Every element named.
The sieve sees everything. The glossary names everything. The agent knows everything. LeftGlove plus OpenClaw. Deterministic page understanding for AI agents.
